mapper.select: /* PtnrCalcMapper.getPtnrCalcLpointSttlList */ SELECT SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS TOT_REQ_POINT , TRUNC(SUM(A.REQ_POINT) * 0.1) AS ACML_CMSN , TRUNC(TRUNC(SUM(A.REQ_POINT) * 0.1) * 0.1) AS ACML_CMSN_VAT , TRUNC(SUM(A.REQ_POINT) * 0.1) + TRUNC(TRUNC(SUM(A.REQ_POINT) * 0.1) * 0.1) AS TOT_CMSN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) + TRUNC(SUM(A.REQ_POINT) * 0.1) + TRUNC(TRUNC(SUM(A.REQ_POINT) * 0.1) * 0.1) AS STTL_AMNT FROM MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_01 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.LINK_YM = #{searchYm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RES_CD = '00' GROUP BY A.LINK_YM
